race.comment: ARDASHIR (1) is a lightly raced gelding who looks ready to improve rising in trip. He was a former import from Ireland who debuted over 2514m in Ireland and has been solid in two runs here over shorter. Suspect he'll relish the distance and take plenty of beating. ANGEL FEET (4) has raced at Yarra Valley his past three, finding the line well enough behind a dominant winner for second there last time. He's bred to stay so getting up to this trip now suits on the bigger track and Lane goes on from a soft gate. ZINOVATION (3) has been good in three runs back and will be peaking now with genuine claims while ERUPT (6) wasn't far away on debut here and can improve quickly up in trip.
